steps.name: Creating Inwarranty job with create job API
Setting up the BASE_URI,Content type as Aplication/JSON and attaching the SensitiveData filter for a role and attaching payload
Getting the property value from the config file
Getting the auth token for the role

parameters.name: Payload
parameters.value: CreateJobPayload[mst_service_location_id=0, mst_platform_id=2, mst_warrenty_status_id=1, mst_oem_id=1, customer=Customer[first_name=Rowland, last_name=Wunsch, mobile_number=758-252-7805, mobile_number_alt=, email_id=Libbie_Frami@yahoo.com, email_id_alt=], customer_address=CustomerAddress[flat_number=1229, apartment_name=park villa, street_name=15th street, landmark=axis bank kolathur, area=poompuhar nagar, pincode=600099, country=India, state=Tamil Nadu], customer_product=CustomerProduct[dop=2026-07-05T13:54:05.132321503Z, serial_number=14238575534409, imei1=14238575534409, imei2=14238575534409, popurl=2026-07-05T13:54:05.132352229Z, product_id=1, mst_model_id=1], problems=[Problems[id=1, remark=phone is running slow]]]

parameters.name: createJobPayload

steps.name: Expecting the response to have content type as Application/JSON, status 200 and response time less than 1000 ms
